title: Apple is reportedly planning new iPad Pro and MacBook Pro releases early next year
summary: Apple is preparing new iPad Pro tablets and a more affordable MacBook Pro for release early next year, continuing the company's regular refresh cycle for its tablet and laptop lines.
content: Apple is readying several new iPad Pro tablets, and a budget-friendly MacBook Pro, reports suggest.

zh.title: 苹果据报计划明年初发布新款iPad Pro和MacBook Pro
zh.summary: 苹果正在准备新的iPad Pro平板电脑和更便宜的MacBook Pro，计划在明年初发布，继续公司对其平板电脑和笔记本电脑产品线的定期更新周期。

title: Bending Spoons defies SaaS slump, surges 40% on first day of trading
summary: Bending Spoons, an Italian company known for acquiring struggling tech brands like AOL, Eventbrite, and Vimeo, surged 40% on its first trading day despite broader SaaS sector weakness. The acquisition strategy has proven successful in revitalizing ailing internet properties.
content: The company has grown rapidly by acquiring and revamping last-generation tech brands like AOL, Eventbrite, Evernote, Meetup, and Vimeo.

zh.title: Bending Spoons逆势而上，上市首日暴涨40%
zh.summary: Bending Spoons是一家以收购美国在线、Eventbrite和Vimeo等陷入困境的科技品牌而闻名的意大利公司，尽管整个SaaS行业疲软，该公司上市首日暴涨40%。其收购策略已被证明在振兴陷入困境的互联网资产方面非常成功。

title: Apple’s entry-level MacBook Pro could be up for a redesign
summary: Apple is developing a redesigned entry-level MacBook Pro with a 14-inch screen expected to launch in the first half of 2027, with design elements matching planned touchscreen MacBooks. The company is also testing four new iPad Pros set for spring release.
content:
Apple is working on a "revamped" version of its entry-level MacBook Pro that it could launch as soon as the first half of 2027, Bloomberg reports. The company is also testing four new iPad Pros that are set to launch in the spring with a focus on "internal improvements."
The updated MacBook Pro, which will keep the 14-inch screen size, will have a design that's "in line" with what Apple is planning for the touch screen MacBooks it also has in the works, Bloomberg says. Those new touch screen laptops are set to be released between "the end of this year and early next year," and Bloomberg has previously reported that they will get a Dynamic I …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果入门级MacBook Pro可能面临重新设计
zh.summary: 苹果正在开发一款重新设计的入门级MacBook Pro，配备14英寸屏幕，预计在2027年上半年推出，设计元素与计划推出的触屏MacBook相匹配。该公司还在测试四款新的iPad Pro，计划在春季发布。

title: After $18B IPO, Bending Spoons founder says success comes from minimizing luck
summary: Following its successful $18 billion IPO, Bending Spoons co-founders reflect on how their strategy of acquiring and revamping struggling tech brands taught them lessons about succeeding despite uncertainty. The approach reflects wisdom gained from their startup's earlier failure.
content: The co-founders of Bending Spoons, the Italian company quietly buying beloved, ailing Internet brands, learned big lessons from their own startup's failure.

zh.title: 融资180亿美元后,Bending Spoons创始人表示成功来自于降低运气因素
zh.summary: 在成功融资180亿美元后,Bending Spoons联合创始人反思他们通过收购和改造陷入困境的科技品牌所获得的经验,这些经验教会他们如何在不确定性中取得成功。这种方法反映了他们初创公司早期失败所获得的智慧。

title: The funeral for PlayStation discs has begun
summary: Sony announced it will discontinue making discs for new PlayStation games starting January 2028, sparking concern among retail stores, game preservationists, and consumers who value physical media. The move raises issues around game ownership, sharing, and accessibility.
content:
Cody Spencer, the co-owner of the small games retail chain Pink Gorilla Games, put it well when I asked about the impact of Sony's recent announcement that it will stop making discs for new games starting January 2028. "It's sad to see. This decision is only a negative for gamers. We're losing the ability to sell games, to share games, and to own games."
Sony's announcement has been devastating news for many in the games industry. Not just players, but also groups like independent retail stores and preservationists that try and make gaming more accessible.
"This is unfortunate news for those who still prefer buying games on physical media, …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: PlayStation光盘的谢幕已经开始
zh.summary: 索尼宣布将从2028年1月开始停止为新的PlayStation游戏制造光盘,这引发了零售店、游戏保存者和重视物理媒体的消费者的担忧。这一举措引发了关于游戏所有权、共享和可访问性的问题。

title: WhatsApp usernames are already raising impersonation red flags
summary: Meta's introduction of WhatsApp usernames intended to improve privacy is facing criticism over potential impersonation risks, with observers questioning whether Meta's safeguards are sufficient. The feature highlights the tension between privacy improvements and security concerns.
content: Meta says usernames improve privacy, but critics question whether its safeguards can prevent impersonation.

zh.title: WhatsApp用户名已经引发了冒充身份的警报
zh.summary: Meta推出的旨在改善隐私的WhatsApp用户名功能因潜在的冒充身份风险而面临批评,观察人士质疑Meta的防护措施是否足够。该功能突出了隐私改进和安全问题之间的矛盾。

title: T-Mobile moving tens of thousands of virtual machines off VMware amid lawsuit
summary: T-Mobile is migrating tens of thousands of virtual machines away from VMware following Broadcom's acquisition, seeking continued support for its existing perpetual licenses. The migration reflects broader industry tension over licensing terms after major consolidation.
content: T-Mobile wants Broadcom to keep supporting its VMware perpetual licenses.

zh.title: T-Mobile 在诉讼中迁移数万台虚拟机离开 VMware
zh.summary: T-Mobile 在 Broadcom 收购后正在迁移数万台虚拟机离开 VMware，寻求继续支持其现有的永久许可证。此次迁移反映了主要整合后行业对许可条款的广泛紧张关系。

title: Xbox’s ‘reset’: all the news about Microsoft’s looming layoffs and studio closures
summary: Microsoft's Xbox division is undergoing major restructuring with planned July layoffs and potential studio closures as new CEO Asha Sharma addresses rising costs and operational inefficiencies. The reset includes price increases, game cancellations, and changes to service offerings.
content:
Xbox is making some big changes — again. On June 10th, a few months after Asha Sharma took over as CEO, she and newly-promoted chief content officer Matt Booty sent a memo to staff warning of an “Xbox reset.” The business, they said, is facing significant challenges, including a 3 percent “accountability margin,” massively higher component prices for consoles due to the memory and storage shortage, and an “over extended” studio system.
That same day, The Verge and Bloomberg reported that the Xbox division was planning layoffs in July. The cuts, expected to be announced on July 6th, could include studio closures or spinoffs. The Verge‘s Tom Warren reported on June 30th that Microsoft is looking at closing at least five studios and potentially canceling games like Blade.
Under Sharma’s leadership, Xbox has already made some other major changes, including upcoming price hikes for Xbox consoles, lowering Game Pass prices but cutting out new Call of Duty games, rebranding Xbox to XBOX, and making both Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution Xbox console exclusives.
Read on for all of our coverage of the shifts at Xbox.

zh.title: Xbox 的"重启"：关于微软即将到来的裁员和工作室关闭的所有新闻
zh.summary: 微软 Xbox 部门正在进行大规模重组，新首席执行官 Asha Sharma 计划 7 月进行裁员和潜在工作室关闭，以解决成本上升和运营效率低下问题。此次重启包括价格上涨、游戏取消和服务提供变化。

title: Elon Musk denies a report about SpaceX’s AI phone prototype
summary: Elon Musk denied a Wall Street Journal report claiming SpaceX showed investors an AI phone prototype before its IPO, calling the story "utterly false." The alleged device would have featured custom AI powered by SpaceX's xAI division.
content:
Elon Musk says a report about a SpaceX AI phone prototype is "utterly false." The report, published on Wednesday by The Wall Street Journal, says SpaceX showed off a "handset-like prototype" to some investors before launching its record-breaking initial public offering in June.
The device was "slimmer than an iPhone," and they were told it would run on a Qualcomm Snapdragon chip, according to the WSJ. It would also reportedly use its own AI-enabled operating system with features powered by the SpaceX-owned xAI.
Last week, the Financial Times reported that SpaceX chief operating officer Gwynne Shotwell told investors that the company is con …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克否认关于 SpaceX AI 手机原型的报告
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克否认了《华尔街日报》的报道，该报道声称 SpaceX 在首次公开募股前向投资者展示了 AI 手机原型，他称该故事"完全虚假"。该据称设备将配备 SpaceX xAI 部门提供的定制 AI。

title: NASA chief praises progress Blue Origin is making after launch failure
summary: NASA leadership praised Blue Origin's progress following a recent launch setback, indicating adequate timeline flexibility before critical delays emerge. The statement demonstrates NASA's continued confidence in Blue Origin as a contractor for its space programs.
content: "We've got time into 2027 before we're getting nervous."

zh.title: NASA负责人称Blue Origin在发射失败后取得进展
zh.summary: NASA领导层称赞Blue Origin在最近发射挫折后的进展，表明在关键延误出现之前有足够的时间灵活性。该声明表明NASA对Blue Origin作为其太空项目承包商的持续信心。

title: Apple’s Hide My Email feature has a bug that’s been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims
summary: A security researcher discovered a bug in Apple's Hide My Email privacy feature that reportedly exposes users' actual email addresses, potentially undermining the feature's core purpose. The vulnerability could render the privacy protection mechanism ineffective.
content: Research appears to reveal a bug that could render the feature effectively useless.

zh.title: 研究人员称Apple的"隐藏我的电子邮件"功能存在漏洞，暴露了真实电子邮件地址
zh.summary: 安全研究人员发现了Apple"隐藏我的电子邮件"隐私功能中的一个漏洞，该漏洞据报可能暴露用户的真实电子邮件地址，可能破坏该功能的核心目的。该漏洞可能会使隐私保护机制失效。

title: US home battery installations hit record high on rising electricity costs
summary: Home battery installations in the US reached record levels as rising electricity costs incentivize residential energy storage adoption. The trend is reshaping grid operations and supporting growing power demands from AI data centers.
content: Record home battery installations unlock options for grids—and AI data centers.

zh.title: 美国家用电池安装创历史新高，电费上升推动
zh.summary: 随着电费上升促使居民采用能源储存，美国家用电池安装创历史新高。这一趋势正在重塑电网运营，并支持AI数据中心不断增长的电力需求。

title: Superworms could replace beetles for cleaning skeletal remains
summary: Research shows that a specific ratio of 10-15 grams of superworm larvae per gram of specimen can clean skeletal remains efficiently without bone damage. The finding could provide an alternative to traditional beetle colonies used in forensic and museum work.
content: An optimal ratio of 10-15 grams of larvae per gram of specimen minimized cleaning time with no bone damage.

zh.title: 超级蠕虫可能取代甲虫用于清理骨骼遗骨
zh.summary: 研究表明，每克标本使用10-15克超级蠕虫幼虫的特定比例可以高效清理骨骼遗骨，且不会对骨骼造成损伤。这一发现可能为法医和博物馆工作中使用的传统甲虫菌落提供替代方案。

title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
summary: SpaceX reportedly demonstrated an AI device with phone-like features to investors before its IPO, signaling the company's interest in expanding into wireless communications. The handset-like prototype suggests SpaceX may be pursuing consumer technology ventures.
content: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

zh.title: SpaceX推出AI设备原型，听起来像手机
zh.summary: SpaceX据报在IPO前向投资者展示了一款具有类似手机功能的AI设备，表明该公司有兴趣扩展到无线通信领域。这款类似手机的原型表明SpaceX可能在追求消费者技术业务。

title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
summary: Ashton Kutcher is departing Sound Ventures to establish a new venture capital firm with Morgan Beller focused on AI infrastructure and energy systems. The new fund targets foundational technologies underlying AI companies rather than the companies themselves.
content: Sound built its reputation on concentrated, high-conviction bets in category-leading AI labs, while Kutcher's new fund appears to be chasing the layer underneath those companies — the infrastructure and energy that power them.

zh.title: Ashton Kutcher离开Sound Ventures与Morgan Beller创办新风投公司
zh.summary: Ashton Kutcher正在离开Sound Ventures，与Morgan Beller合作建立一家专注于AI基础设施和能源系统的新风险投资公司。这个新基金的目标是支持AI公司背后的基础技术，而不是这些公司本身。

title: Neocloud Together AI raises $800M, leaps to $8.3B valuation
summary: Together AI raised $800M in funding, reaching an $8.3B valuation—up from $3.3B in early 2025. The AI cloud provider specializes in hosting open-source models and demonstrates strong investor confidence in that market segment.
content: The AI neocloud provider, which specializes in hosting open source models, last raised at a $3.3 billion valuation in early 2025.

zh.title: Neocloud Together AI融资8亿美元，估值飙升至83亿美元
zh.summary: Together AI融资8亿美元，估值达到83亿美元——相比2025年初的33亿美元大幅增长。这家AI云提供商专门从事开源模型的托管，展现了投资者对该市场的强烈信心。

title: Lime begins life as a public company after years of uncertainty
summary: Mobility company Lime went public after years of uncertainty, enabling the nine-year-old scooter and bike-share service to address approximately $1 billion in liabilities. The IPO represents a major milestone for the company's path to profitability.
content: The nine-year-old scooter and bike-share company has said it needs the funds to help pay down around $1 billion in liabilities.

zh.title: Lime在多年不确定后作为上市公司开启新篇章
zh.summary: 共享出行公司Lime经过多年不确定后成功上市，使这家运营九年的滑板车和自行车共享服务能够应对约10亿美元的债务。这次IPO代表了公司走向盈利的重要里程碑。

title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
summary: Cloudflare is requiring AI companies to separate their web crawlers used for search from those used for training and agents by September 15, or risk being blocked on many publisher sites. The policy aims to ensure AI companies compensate publishers for content used in training.
content: Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.

zh.title: Cloudflare新政策推动AI公司为发布商内容付费
zh.summary: Cloudflare要求AI公司在9月15日前将用于搜索的网络爬虫与用于训练和代理的爬虫分离，否则可能会被许多发布商网站封禁。该政策旨在确保AI公司为训练中使用的内容向发布商支付费用。

title: Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million
summary: After a lengthy legal dispute, Krafton settled with its subsidiary Unknown Worlds Entertainment, which is developing Subnautica 2, and will pay bonuses to studio staff. The dispute centered on a $250 million bonus tied to financial goals that Krafton had withheld after pushing out the studio's leadership.
content:
After a lengthy legal dispute, Krafton has settled with its subsidiary Unknown Worlds Entertainment, which is developing Subnautica 2, and will pay bonuses to the studio's staff, Bloomberg reports.
The dispute began last year after Krafton pushed out Unknown Worlds' cofounders, Charlie Cleveland and Max McGuire, and its CEO, Ted Gill, ahead of a potential $250 million bonus for hitting certain financial goals that would have been shared with the studio. After the executives sued, a judge reinstated Gill as CEO in March, and Subnautica 2 finally launched in early access in May. The game passed four million copies sold in five days.
Details  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Krafton与《深海迷航2》开发商达成和解，争议涉及2.5亿美元
zh.summary: 经过漫长的法律纠纷，Krafton与其子公司Unknown Worlds Entertainment达成和解，该公司正在开发《深海迷航2》，并将向工作室员工支付奖金。这场纠纷的焦点是Krafton扣留的2.5亿美元奖金，该奖金与财务目标挂钩，Krafton在赶出工作室领导层后一直扣留这笔款项。

title: Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection
summary: Microsoft is testing a disc-to-digital feature that will allow Xbox owners to convert their physical game collections to digital versions. The feature, currently in testing with Xbox employees, will work with Xbox One and Xbox Series X discs only.
content:
Microsoft will likely soon follow Sony and stop the production of physical discs for Xbox games. But instead of leaving physical discs behind entirely, sources familiar with Microsoft's plans tell me the company has quietly been working on a disc-to-digital feature that will allow Xbox owners to digitize their existing physical game collections.
Xbox employees recently started testing this new feature, after references to "enable Disc2Digital" appeared in the Xbox PC app code in May. I'm told that Microsoft's disc-to-digital feature will work on Xbox One and Xbox Series X discs only, and not those for the Xbox 360 or original Xbox console.
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox测试光盘转数字功能，可将实体游戏库转换为数字版本
zh.summary: 微软正在测试一项光盘转数字功能，该功能将允许Xbox所有者将其实体游戏库转换为数字版本。该功能目前正在与Xbox员工进行测试，仅适用于Xbox One和Xbox Series X光盘。

title: Even Honda is pivoting to data centers
summary: Honda is pivoting into the data center battery market, beginning production of power storage systems for data centers rather than vehicles. The move reflects growing demand for energy infrastructure supporting the booming data center industry.
content: Honda wants in on the lucrative energy storage market. This week it began producing batteries destined for data centers, not driveways.

zh.title: 连本田也在转向数据中心业务
zh.summary: 本田正在进军数据中心电池市场，开始生产数据中心的电力存储系统，而非汽车。这一举措反映了对支撑蓬勃发展的数据中心行业的能源基础设施日益增长的需求。

title: Autonomous vehicle hype is back, and Humble Robotics is bringing it to freight
summary: The autonomous vehicle sector is experiencing renewed hype reminiscent of 2016, with key figures like Travis Kalanick returning and companies like Humble Robotics focusing on freight automation. Capital is flowing back into the space as talent wars heat up again.
content: The autonomous vehicle space is starting to feel like a repeat of the 2016 hype cycle. Travis Kalanick is back building a robotics company, and the talent wars and capital are heating up the same way they did the first time around. The money’s flowing back, and it’s the people who lived through that first […]

zh.title: 自动驾驶炒作重燃，Humble Robotics 将其带入运输领域
zh.summary: 自动驾驶行业正经历类似2016年的炒作热潮，包括特拉维斯·卡兰尼克等关键人物回归，以及Humble Robotics等公司专注于货运自动化。资本重新涌入这一领域，人才竞争也再次升温。

title: My favorite Kindle alternative is $30 off after a recent price increase
summary: The Kobo Libra Colour e-reader is currently discounted to $229.99 across multiple retailers, erasing a recent price increase from $259.99. The device offers advantages over Amazon's Kindle, including EPUB support, note-taking capability via optional stylus, and broader file format compatibility.
content:
The Kobo Libra Colour lets you take notes. | Image: Rakuten Kobo	

Kobo recently raised the price of its Libra Colour e-reader to $259.99, but today’s deal effectively erases that hike. The company, Best Buy, and Target, are all selling it for its old $229.99 price as part of broader sales, making now one of the best times to grab my favorite alternative to Amazon’s Kindle.
Kobo Libra Colour

Where to Buy:

 $259.99 $229.99 at Best Buy
 $259.99 $229.99 at Rakuten Kobo
 $259.99 $229.99 at Target

If you’re not heavily invested in Amazon’s ecosystem, I think the Kobo Libra Colour is a better buy than its closest Amazon rival, the $249.99 Kindle Colorsoft. It offers many of the same core features, including a sharp seven-inch color display that makes book covers, comics, and highlights pop with only slightly less vibrancy than the color Kindle. It’s also waterproof so you can rest easy at the beach, and features adjustable warm lighting for more comfortable nighttime reading.
The Kobo also has a few advantages over Amazon’s e-reader. It supports EPUB and a broader range of file formats, making it easier to read books from a variety of sources, while offering twice as much storage (32GB). Unlike the Colorsoft, the Libra Colour includes physical page-turning buttons, which I find make for a more intuitive reading experience. It also supports Kobo’s optional Stylus 2, letting you annotate ebooks, jot down handwritten notes, use built-in notebook templates, and even convert your handwriting into typed text. Due to its size, I wouldn’t recommend it as a dedicated digital notebook over something bigger like the Kobo Elipsa 2E or Kindle Scribe, but it’s far more practical for quick notes than using your phone. It also works with Instapaper, making it easy to save web articles for offline reading.
Read our Kobo Libra Colour review.

zh.title: 我最喜欢的Kindle替代品现在便宜了30美元
zh.summary: Kobo Libra Colour电子阅读器目前在多家零售商处折扣价为229.99美元，抵消了之前从259.99美元的价格上涨。该设备相比亚马逊Kindle具有优势，包括EPUB支持、通过可选手写笔进行笔记功能以及更广泛的文件格式兼容性。

title: NASA inspector general suggests Boeing's Starliner will now be a decade late
summary: NASA's inspector general suggests Boeing's Starliner certification could be delayed to 2027, making the spacecraft roughly a decade behind its original schedule. The continued delays extend Boeing's timeline for its Commercial Crew Program vehicle.
content: Starliner's certification may be delayed to 2027, 10 years later than Boeing's original schedule.

zh.title: NASA监察长表示波音Starliner现在将晚十年认证
zh.summary: NASA监察长表示波音Starliner的认证可能延迟到2027年，使该航天器比原定计划晚约十年。持续的延迟延长了波音商业载人计划航天器的时间表。

title: Comcast’s split could make or break Peacock
summary: Comcast is planning to split NBCUniversal and its streaming service Peacock from its broadband and wireless business, forcing Peacock to operate independently. The separation will test whether Peacock can compete successfully without backing from the combined $123 billion company.
content:
NBCUniversal executives are about to find out whether Peacock will sink or swim in the streaming industry. Now that Comcast is planning to split NBCUniversal, Peacock, and Sky from its broadband and wireless businesses, Peacock will be forced to stand on its own - without the backing of a combined company that pulled in more than $123 billion last year.
In the years following its launch in 2020, Peacock was treated as an accessory to an Xfinity subscription. But once Comcast stopped offering it as a free perk to Xfinity X1 and Flex subscribers and axed its free membership tier in 2023, it was a sign that Comcast believed Peacock had somethi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Comcast的分拆可能决定Peacock的成败
zh.summary: Comcast计划将NBCUniversal及其流媒体服务Peacock从宽带和无线业务中分离出来,迫使Peacock独立运营。这一分离将考验Peacock是否能在没有这家1230亿美元综合公司支持的情况下成功竞争。

title: A space history mystery: What happened to the Viking arm used 50 years ago?
summary: A historical mystery surrounds a robotic arm used during the Viking space program 50 years ago and its current whereabouts. The story highlights questions about preservation of space exploration artifacts.
content: A timely tale about a 50-year-old robotic arm...

zh.title: 太空历史谜团:50年前维京计划使用的机械臂去哪了?
zh.summary: 关于50年前维京太空计划期间使用的机械臂及其现在下落的历史谜团。这个故事突显了有关太空探索文物保护的问题。

title: The best Switch 2 case I’ve tried is cheaper than usual
summary: The Dbrand Killswitch 2 Nintendo Switch 2 case is currently discounted to $69.99–$71.99 (usually $80), featuring versatile design for both handheld and docked modes. The case offers superior build quality and ergonomic improvements through better Joy-Con slip covers and a USB-C dock adapter.
content:
The Killswitch 2 lets you easily use the Switch 2 in handheld or docked modes. | Image: The Verge	

Dbrand apparently knows how to really whiff a product launch, as we recently saw with the Steam Machine Companion Cube shell. But it also makes the best case out there for the Nintendo Switch 2, which happens to be discounted right now. The Killswitch 2 is versatile, with better build quality than other similar models, snapping around the back and the edges of the console, with Joy-Con slip covers that add a bulkier, more ergonomically-friendly feel to the controllers. The “Travel” bundle that also includes a hard bungee strap-secured cover to protect the screen (that can hold 10 cartridges) plus stick grips is $69.99 at Dbrand, or $71.99 at Best Buy (usually $80).
Dbrand Killswitch – Switch 2

Where to Buy:

 $79.99 $71.99 at Best Buy (Travel kit)
 $79.95 $69.95 at Dbrand (Travel kit)

The Killswitch 2 is a great pick if you want to retain the console’s hybrid use cases, swapping with ease between handheld to docked mode. The case includes a USB-C dock adapter to let you beam the console’s video feed to a TV; it’s a slightly cumbersome solution if you’re aiming to have a tidy entertainment center, but I haven’t seen other brands achieve a more elegant adapter solution yet. 
Read my review of the Killswitch 2.
Other good deals to consider
Walmart is offering a fantastic deal on Acer’s 27-inch 1440p QD-OLED gaming monitor. Originally $549.99, it’s down to $314.99 online, which was the same price we saw during Amazon Prime Day last week. It’s tough to beat the value here. For one, OLEDs offer unparalleled contrast compared to other panel types, not to mention the fastest response time around. The Predator X27U here has a 240Hz refresh rate, two DisplayPort 1.4 ports, and two HDMI 2.1 ports. It includes a heigh-adjustable stand that supports swiveling and pivoting, and the monitor has built-in speakers, though they likely aren’t all that good. Importantly, the monitor is

zh.title: 我用过最好的Switch 2保护壳现在便宜了
zh.summary: Dbrand Killswitch 2 Nintendo Switch 2保护壳目前折扣至$69.99–$71.99(通常售价$80),具有支持掌机和底座模式的多功能设计。该保护壳通过更好的Joy-Con滑套和USB-C底座适配器提供卓越的构建质量和人体工程学改进。

title: Sony is killing discs — and showing us why it’s a terrible idea
summary: Sony announced it will stop producing PlayStation discs by January 2028 and is winding down digital stores for PS3 and PS Vita, illustrating risks of digital-only gaming. The moves raise significant concerns about long-term video game preservation and consumer access.
content:
The future of video game preservation just took a major hit. This morning, Sony announced that, starting in January 2028, the company will no longer produce physical PlayStation discs, which means that from that moment on you can only purchase new PS5 games digitally. At the same time, Sony also announced that it's going to start winding down the digital stores for both the PS3 and PS Vita, helpfully illustrating one of the most pertinent issues with a digital-only future for gaming: Once the stores are gone, so are the games. It's a terrible blow for preservation of the medium.
In a lot of ways, both announcements seemed inevitable. It's c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼正在放弃光盘——向我们展示为什么这是个糟糕主意
zh.summary: 索尼宣布将在2028年1月前停止生产PlayStation光盘,并逐步关闭PS3和PS Vita的数字商店,说明了全数字游戏的风险。这些举措引发了对长期游戏保存和消费者访问权的重大担忧。

title: Venice AI becomes a unicorn with $65M Series A as its privacy-first AI platform takes off
summary: Privacy-focused AI platform Venice AI achieved unicorn status with a $65 million Series A funding round, with the company already profitable at over $70 million in annualized run-rate revenues. The milestone reflects growing investor appetite for privacy-preserving AI solutions.
content: Venice AI is already profitable, with annualized run-rate revenues of over $70 million, CEO Erik Voorhees said.

zh.title: Venice AI凭借6500万美元融资成为独角兽,其隐私优先的AI平台起飞

title: Gemini Spark, Google’s agentic assistant, is now available on Mac
summary: Google has launched Gemini Spark, its 24/7 agentic assistant, on macOS alongside improvements like real-time tracking and expanded app support. The expansion brings Google's AI assistant to Mac users with enhanced capabilities.
content: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant, Gemini Spark, comes to Mac alongside other improvements, like real-time tracking and support for more apps.

zh.title: Google的代理助手Gemini Spark现已在Mac上推出
zh.summary: Google在macOS上推出了其24/7代理助手Gemini Spark,并提供了实时跟踪和扩展应用支持等改进。这一扩展为Mac用户带来了增强功能的Google AI助手。

title: Sony is closing the PS3 and Vita digital stores
summary: Sony is shutting down digital storefronts for PS3 and PS Vita, with closures beginning in select Latin American and Middle Eastern markets in August 2026 and completing globally by July 2027. Users will no longer be able to purchase new content after closure but can continue downloading previously purchased games.
content:
It's the end of an era for the PlayStation store on PS3 and PS Vita, with Sony now planning to shut down its digital distribution service on both consoles. The PlayStation store on PS3 will close in select markets later this year, including Mexico, Honduras, and Nicaragua starting in August, with "additional Latin American and Middle Eastern countries" to follow in late 2026.
The shutdown across both PS3 and PS Vita "in all other countries" will take effect in July 2027. After this date, Sony says that console owners will be unable to purchase new content, but can continue downloading games they've previously purchased "for the foreseeable  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼关闭PS3和Vita数字商店
zh.summary: 索尼正关闭PS3和PS Vita的数字商店，从2026年8月起在拉丁美洲和中东的部分市场开始关闭，将于2027年7月全球完成。关闭后用户将无法购买新内容，但仍可继续下载之前购买的游戏。

title: Sony is killing all physical PlayStation game discs
summary: Sony will cease production of physical PlayStation game discs starting January 2028, shifting all new releases to digital-only distribution. This transition reflects the gaming industry's broader shift toward consumer preference for digital media.
content:
Sony’s PlayStation 5 Pro doesn’t even feature a disc drive. | Photo by Vjeran Pavic / The Verge	

Sony has announced that from January 2028 it will entirely stop the production of physical discs for new PlayStation games. From that point onwards, new releases will only be available in digital versions from the PlayStation Store and other retailers. Games released before January 2028 will still be available on disc.
"This is a natural direction for Sony Interactive Entertainment to adapt to consumer trends as the general preference for digital media significantly outpaces physical discs," Sony said in its announcement. "This transition will enable us to align more closely with how most of our community prefers to access and play games to …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼停止所有PlayStation物理游戏光盘
zh.summary: 索尼将从2028年1月起停止生产PlayStation物理游戏光盘，将所有新版本转向数字专销。这一转变反映了游戏行业向消费者数字媒体偏好转变的更大趋势。

title: Google built a great smart speaker, but Gemini isn’t ready for it
summary: Google released its first new smart speaker in six years, the Google Home Speaker, which is specifically designed around Gemini AI capabilities. However, the Gemini for Home experience remains incomplete and unpolished, limiting the device's practical value.
content:
The Google Home Speaker is Google’s first smart speaker in years. And it’s pretty! | Photo: Jennifer Patison Tuohy / The Verge	

Smart speakers have spent the past few years searching for a compelling second act. Beyond music, timers, and controlling your lights, they've struggled to justify taking up space on the kitchen counter. AI promised to change that.
Amazon debuted its new hardware powered by a revamped Alexa last fall, and now it's finally Google's turn. The Google Home Speaker is the company's first new smart speaker in six years and its first "built for Gemini." After years of neglect, Google appears to be finally getting serious about the smart home - again. The new speaker is the clearest sign yet. Gemini for Home, however, still feels unfinished.
Google …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌打造出色智能扬声器，但Gemini还未准备好
zh.summary: 谷歌发布了六年来首款新型智能扬声器Google Home Speaker，该产品专门围绕Gemini人工智能功能设计。但是，Home版Gemini的体验仍不完整和不完善，限制了该设备的实际价值。

title: Rhythm Heaven never misses a beat
summary: Nintendo released Rhythm Heaven Groove for Switch on July 2nd, marking the franchise's return after over a decade. The series maintains its reputation for consistent quality with a collection of quirky, music-focused minigames.
content:
Rhythm Heaven isn't Nintendo's best-known series, nor its most prolific. Prior to the launch of Rhythm Heaven Groove on the Switch this week - it's out on July 2nd - there were only four previous entries, one of which was exclusive to Japan. The most recent came out more than a decade ago. Even still, there's a case to be made that this is Nintendo's most consistent franchise. There are few guarantees in life, but a new Rhythm Heaven being great is one of them.
If you're unfamiliar, Rhythm Heaven is sort of like a music-focused version of WarioWare. That means it's a collection of short and bizarre minigames, except these ones all test your …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 节奏天堂永不失节奏
zh.summary: 任天堂于7月2日为Switch发布《节奏天堂Groove》，标志着该系列在十多年后的回归。该系列以其出色品质和一系列奇趣音乐小游戏而享有盛誉。

title: Scientists find no link between Tylenol and autism, again, after Trump warning
summary: New scientific studies again find no connection between Tylenol use during pregnancy and autism risk, further discrediting unfounded claims that led some pregnant women to avoid the medication. The research reinforces the drug's established safety profile in pregnancy.
content: After Trump's claims, Tylenol usage dropped during pregnancies.

zh.title: 科学家再次发现泰诺林与自闭症无关，驳斥特朗普警告
zh.summary: 新的科学研究再次证实孕期使用泰诺林与自闭症风险之间没有关联，进一步否定了导致部分孕妇拒绝使用该药物的无根据说法。该研究强化了该药物在妊娠期的既有安全性。

title: Range anxiety
summary: A severe tornado struck Rivian's Illinois manufacturing facility in April, causing major structural damage including roof destruction and widespread flooding from triggered sprinkler systems. The incident occurred at a critical moment as the company prepared to launch its affordable R2 model.
content:
The storm developed quickly over west central Illinois on April 17th, first as a single high-intensity system called a supercell, and then later that evening transforming into a long squall line of thunderstorms. Tucked inside a wall of wind were several smaller, quick-forming tornadoes, one of which landed directly on Rivian’s electric vehicle factory on the outskirts of the college town of Normal. The ferocious storm knocked down one of the walls and tore through the plant’s roof like a can opener peeling back the lid.  
Bobby Dean Parker, vice president of manufacturing at Rivian, was at home in Normal when he got the call from someone at the factory. Parker, an affable Southerner, had already experienced his fair share of powerful Midwestern thunderstorms despite only being on the job for six months. But he quickly realized that this one was different. “Hey, it’s not good,” the person on the phone told him. “Oh shit,” Parker thought, before dashing out into the still-stormy night. 
Thousands of miles away at an event in Southern California, Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe’s phone suddenly lit up with a flurry of texts. At first, information was scarce. Was anyone hurt? How bad was it? Scaringe was reluctant to send anyone inside to assess the damage without knowing the structural integrity of the building. Then someone sent him a video. 
Even in the dark, you can immediately see a giant hole in the factory’s roof. The power is out, so floodlights illuminate the wreckage. Water can be heard rushing in the background; the tornado triggered the plant’s sprinkler system, causing the pits under the assembly line to flood. The concrete floor is also slick with water. The damage appears quite extensive. 
Scaringe was stunned; his factory suddenly had what seemed to be its own sunroof.  
For Rivian, the tornado couldn’t have hit at a worse time, or in a worse place. Not only did it strike right as the company was poised to roll out its all-important, more affordable R2 vehicle,

zh.title: 续航焦虑
zh.summary: 一场强烈龙卷风于4月袭击了Rivian位于伊利诺伊州的制造工厂，造成了严重结构破坏，包括屋顶毁损和自动喷水系统触发导致的大范围水灾。这一事件发生在该公司准备推出其经济型R2车型的关键时期。

title: The cube was a lie: up close with our Dbrand Companion Cube before it gets destroyed
summary: Dbrand canceled its Portal-themed Companion Cube shell for Steam Deck following legal threats from Valve. The cancellation marks the company's first major legal defeat after successfully defending similar products against past lawsuits from Nintendo and Sony.
content:
Dbrand is the company that shipped a product that told Nintendo's legal team to "go fuck yourself," and the company that had a second set of lawyer-dodging PS5 plates ready when Sony threatened to sue over the originals. But on June 29th, the company finally ate some serious humble pie, canceling its Portal-themed Companion Cube external shell for the Steam Machine after Valve lawyered up.
I couldn't believe it. Surely Dbrand had to have seen this coming. There must be a plan B, right?
"There is no further plan. We fucked this one up," Dbrand CEO Adam Ijaz now tells me.
He says Dbrand will now have to destroy every single cube it manufact …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谎言的魔方：在被摧毁前近距离观赏我们的Dbrand伴侣立方体
zh.summary: Dbrand在收到Valve的法律威胁后取消了其Portal主题的Steam Deck伴侣立方体壳。这次取消是该公司首次重大法律败诉，此前该公司曾成功为其类似产品对抗任天堂和索尼的诉讼。

title: Fujifilm launches two new QuickSnap cameras because Gen Z can’t get enough
summary: Fujifilm is launching two new disposable camera models to capitalize on Gen Z's growing enthusiasm for retro film photography. The black and white variant and outdoor-focused version are expected to release in fall 2026 at price points under $25.
content:
Here are some example shots taken with the QuickSnap Black and White (left), and the QuickSnap Active (right). | Images by Fujifilm	

Fujifilm is expanding its QuickSnap lineup with a new disposable camera focused on taking monochrome photos and another built to survive harsh outdoor environments. The $22.90 QuickSnap Black and White and the $24.75 QuickSnap Active are expected to launch sometime later this fall, to the delight of Gen Z snappers driving the current resurgence in disposable and retro film cameras.
As the name suggests, the QuickSnap Black and White comes with black and white film installed that's designed to capture "rich contrasts, tones, and textured grains," according to Fujifilm's press release. The camera is also compatible with standard color film pr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 富士胶片推出两款新QuickSnap相机，Z代欲罢不能
zh.summary: 富士胶片正在推出两款新的一次性相机型号，以利用Z代对复古胶片摄影日益增长的热情。黑白版本和户外专用版本预计将在2026年秋季发布，价格低于25美元。

title: Cleared by the US, derailed by the UK: Getty’s Shutterstock merger falls apart
summary: Getty Images is backing out of its $3.7 billion acquisition of Shutterstock following regulatory conditions imposed by the UK Competition and Markets Authority. The UK regulator required Shutterstock to divest its editorial business, which Getty deemed unacceptable despite receiving unconditional antitrust clearance from the US Department of Justice.
content:
Getty says it’s “not required” to accept approval conditions that would force Shutterstock to offload its editorial business. | Image: The Verge	

Getty is planning to axe its $3.7 billion merger agreement with Shutterstock after a UK regulator imposed restrictions that would prevent part of Shutterstock's business from being included in the deal. The move comes despite the US Department of Justice granting the deal "unconditional antitrust clearance" in February.
In an SEC filing published on Tuesday in the US, Getty said it is "not required to accept" approval conditions outlined by the UK Competition and Markets Authority in May that require Shutterstock to sell its global editorial business, including the Backgrid and Splash paparazzi agencies.
Those conditions have proved unappe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 获美国批准却被英国搅黄：Getty的Shutterstock并购告吹
zh.summary: Getty Images在英国竞争与市场监管局施加的监管条件后，退出了对Shutterstock的37亿美元收购。英国监管机构要求Shutterstock剥离其编辑业务，Getty认为这不可接受，尽管获得了美国司法部无条件的反垄断许可。

title: The ‘Father of the Internet’ is finally retiring
summary: "Father of the Internet" Vinton Cerf is retiring from his role as Google's chief internet evangelist. Cerf was one of the original creators of internet protocols and has been instrumental in the platform's development.
content: Vinton Cerf, one of the creators of the protocols underlying the internet, will step down as Google's chief internet evangelist next week.

zh.title: "互联网之父"正式退休

title: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
summary: The Trump administration has removed restrictions on Anthropic's AI models Mythos and Fable. This reflects the administration's inconsistent approach to AI regulation, leaving companies uncertain about future policy direction.
content: The Trump administration's erratic approach to AI policymaking has left companies across the industry with little clarity about what will govern future model releases.

zh.title: 特朗普解除对Anthropic的Mythos和Fable模型的限制
zh.summary: 特朗普政府已取消对Anthropic公司AI模型Mythos和Fable的限制。这反映了政府在AI监管上态度的不一致，导致企业对未来政策方向感到不确定。

title: Wayve launches $85M employee tender offer at $8.5B valuation
summary: Autonomous vehicle startup Wayve is offering an $85 million employee tender at an $8.5 billion valuation. The move reflects a growing trend of AI startups using employee stock offerings as a retention and talent acquisition strategy.
content: Wayve’s offering is part of a growing trend of AI startups using employee tenders as a strategic tool to attract and retain talent.

zh.title: Wayve推出8500万美元员工股权转让计划，估值85亿美元
zh.summary: 自动驾驶初创公司Wayve以85亿美元估值推出了8500万美元员工股权转让计划。此举反映了AI初创公司日益采用员工股票转让作为人才保留和人才获取策略的趋势。

title: Meta is adding ridiculous ‘rate limits’ and a soft paywall to its smart glasses
summary: Meta is implementing a $19.99/month subscription to unlock extended use of its Conversation Focus AI feature on smart glasses; free users are limited to 3 hours monthly while premium subscribers get 15 hours. The move monetizes AI capabilities on hardware users already own.
content:
Would you pay $20 a month for access to AI hardware you already own? That appears to be one of Meta's next bets. This week, it quietly announced that your glasses' Conversation Focus feature will soon be limited to three hours of use per month, unless you pay for a $19.99 Meta One Premium subscription. 
In a help article, the company insists that it won't require a subscription to use your glasses, period; it's merely erecting a "rate limit" for certain AI features. Even premium subscribers will only get 15 hours of Conversation Focus per month under that "rate limit," it claims.
Problem is, Meta's rate limit is ridiculous. The Conversatio …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta 在智能眼镜中添加荒谬的"使用限制"和软付费墙
zh.summary: Meta 正在实施 $19.99/月 的订阅服务，以解锁其智能眼镜上 Conversation Focus AI 功能的扩展使用；免费用户每月限制 3 小时，而高级订阅者获得 15 小时。此举将 AI 功能货币化，这些功能运行在用户已拥有的硬件上。

title: Anthropic’s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
summary: After negotiations with the Trump administration, Anthropic has received clearance to restore access to Claude Fable 5, which was sidelined in June due to export controls. The company will begin redeploying the model immediately.
content:
After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access tomorrow.
Anthropic:
We've received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
We'll begin restoring access tomorrow, and will share an update soon.
We're grateful to our users for their patience, and to everyone who worked with us on redeploying the models.
In early June, Anthropic sidelined Fable 5 - its consumer-facing model built the same underlying technology as Anthropic's My …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic 长期被搁置的 Fable 5 获准回归
zh.summary: 经过与特朗普政府的谈判后，Anthropic 获得了恢复 Claude Fable 5 访问权限的许可，该模型由于出口管制在 6 月被搁置。该公司将立即开始重新部署该模型。
